metadata.title: Animal House - Give Them a Home
metadata.description: A NO-KILL animal rescue in Saudi Arabia founded by Khadija Abdullah. We rescue, rehabilitate, and rehome cats and dogs across the Kingdom.

hero.title: Every Animal Deserves a Loving Home
hero.subtitle: Animal House is a NO-KILL rescue based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Founded by Khadija Abdullah, we rescue cats and dogs from across the Kingdom — from Arar to Jeddah — and find them loving homes as far as Los Angeles and Paris.

features.adoptDesc: All our animals are microchipped, vaccinated, and spayed/neutered before adoption. We conduct home checks and follow-up welfare visits to ensure every pet finds a safe, loving home.
features.donateDesc: Your support funds rescue operations, veterinary care, food, and our TNR program that has prevented over 270,000 future street cat births in Riyadh.
features.volunteerDesc: Join 600+ local Saudi volunteers who help with rescue operations, on-site care, and youth awareness campaigns. We host 12+ educational site visits per year.
features.fosterDesc: Open your home temporarily to a cat or dog in need. Foster homes save lives and help animals transition from street life to family life.

about.title: Our Story
about.history: Animal House was started by Khadija Abdullah with a mission to improve the lives of cats and dogs on the streets of the Kingdom. We have taken dogs in from as far as Arar province and have found adopters for our animals as far as Los Angeles and Paris.
about.nokill: We are a NO-KILL rescue. Any animal who joins us knows they will live their life out in peace on this earth.
about.facility: Our current facility is housed within an Istraha 45 minutes from Riyadh. It includes a cat area, dog area, quarantine rooms, kitten rooms, a nursing mothers room, and an isolation zone for FIV positive cats. We have a weekly visit by a local vet and grooming tables for all animals.
about.team: Our team consists of 4 full-time members who live on-site: a Shelter Director, 2 full-time cleaners, and a driver for pick-up and drop-off. We are supported by a network of dedicated volunteers.

policies.intake1: Any animal who joins us must spend two weeks in quarantine to ensure no diseases spread.
policies.intake2: Rescues come from calls we receive or through our own initiative to leave no street animal unattended.
policies.intake3: Some cats are sent to us from rescue partners in Makkah and Madinah.
policies.intake4: All cats and dogs must be microchipped, spayed/neutered, and fully vaccinated before joining the general population.
policies.adoption1: All adoptees go through a screening process including home checks, social media screening, and reference letters.
policies.adoption2: We perform bi-monthly updates and random welfare checks on all adopted animals.
policies.adoption3: No animal is adopted without being microchipped, vaccinated, and spayed/neutered.

footer.brandDesc: A NO-KILL animal rescue dedicated to saving cats and dogs across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

metadata.title: Contact Animal House - Get in Touch
metadata.description: Contact Animal House animal rescue in Saudi Arabia. Reach us for adoptions, donations, volunteering, or emergency rescues.

hero.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
hero.subtitle: Whether you want to adopt, donate, volunteer, or report an animal in need, our team is here to help.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you! We have received your message and will respond shortly.
form.error: Please fill in all required fields correctly.

whatsapp.title: Quick Chat on WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Prefer instant messaging? Chat with us directly on WhatsApp.

info.locationDetail: Our shelter is located 45 minutes from central Riyadh. Visits by appointment only.

metadata.title: Adopt a Friend - Animal House
metadata.description: Browse cats, dogs, and kittens available for adoption at Animal House in Saudi Arabia. Find your perfect companion today.

adopt.heroSubtitle: Every one of our animals has a unique story. Browse our rescues and find the companion who is waiting just for you.
adopt.noResults: No animals match this filter. Check back soon or contact us to learn about new arrivals.
adopt.applyCtaDesc: We guide you through every step of the adoption process, from the first hello to the follow-up visits that ensure a happy life together.

metadata.title: Donate - Animal House - Save Lives Today
metadata.description: Support Animal House animal rescue in Saudi Arabia. Choose a donation tier and help fund medical care, food, and rescue operations for animals in need.

donate.heroSubtitle: Every donation goes directly to rescuing, healing, and rehoming animals across the Kingdom. Whether it is vaccines, emergency surgery, or a warm meal, your generosity makes it possible.
donate.impactVaccines: = full vaccination course for 1 rescued animal
donate.impactRescue: = covers a full rescue operation including transport and initial care
donate.impactFood: = feeds all shelter animals for an entire month
donate.tierSubtitle: Select an amount that works for you. Every single riyal brings hope to an animal who needs it.
donate.selectTierPrompt: Select an amount above to continue
donate.tier50Desc: Provides full vaccines for one rescued animal, protecting them from deadly diseases.
donate.tier100Desc: Covers urgent medical treatment and medication for an injured or sick animal.
donate.tier250Desc: Funds transport, quarantine, and initial veterinary care for one rescued animal.
donate.tier500Desc: Sponsors food, shelter, and ongoing care for a high-needs animal for a full month.
donate.methodsSubtitle: We offer multiple secure options to make donating easy, wherever you are in the world.
donate.bankTransferDesc: Direct bank transfer in Saudi Riyals. Perfect for local donors and corporate sponsors.
donate.paypalDesc: Give securely from anywhere in the world using your PayPal account or credit card.
donate.cryptoDesc: Donate Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT for fast, borderless giving with full transparency.
donate.transparencySubtitle: We believe in complete transparency. Here is exactly how every donated riyal is spent across our operations.
donate.socialProofSubtitle: From local volunteers to international donors, a global community stands behind Animal House. Together, we are rewriting the future for animals in Saudi Arabia.
donate.testimonial1: I started giving monthly 50 SAR and it felt amazing to know I was vaccinating a real cat every single month. This is the most transparent charity I have ever supported.
donate.testimonial2: As an expat living in Riyadh, I wanted to give back to the community. Donating via PayPal was seamless, and the team sends updates on how funds are used.
donate.testimonial3: We organized a company fundraiser and donated 5,000 SAR. The transparency report they shared with us gave our entire team confidence to keep supporting their mission.
donate.ctaSubtitle: No gift is too small. A single vaccine, a meal, or a surgery — every donation is a promise that we will never turn an animal away.

metadata.title: Volunteer at Animal House - Make a Difference
metadata.description: Join 600+ volunteers helping Animal House rescue animals across Saudi Arabia. Apply today to foster, care, or support events.

hero.title: Be the Change They Need
hero.subtitle: Join a community of compassionate people dedicated to rescuing and rehoming animals across the Kingdom.

roles.title: Ways to Volunteer
roles.onsiteDesc: Help with feeding, cleaning, grooming, and socializing animals at our shelter near Riyadh.
roles.fosterDesc: Provide a temporary loving home for cats or dogs until they find their forever family.
roles.eventsDesc: Assist with adoption days, educational visits, and awareness campaigns in schools and malls.
roles.tnrDesc: Join our Trap-Neuter-Return team to help manage street cat populations humanely across Riyadh.

requirements.title: Volunteer Requirements
requirements.age: Must be 18 years or older (or 16+ with guardian consent)
requirements.commitment: Able to commit at least 4 hours per month
requirements.location: Based in or near Riyadh for on-site roles
requirements.attitude: Compassionate, reliable, and ready to get your hands dirty
requirements.training: Attend a brief orientation before starting

form.title: Apply to Volunteer
form.name: Full Name
form.message: Why do you want to volunteer?
form.success: Thank you! Your application has been received. We will contact you within 3–5 business days.
form.error: Please fill in all required fields correctly.

items.quote: Volunteering at Animal House changed my life. I found purpose in caring for animals who had no one else.
items.name: Aisha Al-Rashid

items.quote: Fostering kittens taught my whole family empathy. We have helped 12 cats find homes so far!
items.name: Noor Fahad

items.quote: The TNR program is making a real difference in Riyadh. Every cat we help means fewer suffering on the streets.
items.name: Omar Khalid

about.title: A Mission Born from Compassion
about.paragraph1: Animal House was started by Colin Rhys and Khadija Abdullah with a mission to improve the lives of cats and dogs on the streets of the Kingdom. We have taken dogs in from as far as Arar province and found adopters as far as Los Angeles and Paris.
about.paragraph2: We are a NO-KILL rescue. Any animal who joins us knows they will live their life out in peace on this earth. Our current facility near Riyadh houses 300+ cats and 15+ dogs, with dedicated quarantine, kitten, and nursing areas.

story.title: A rescue built like a promise.

notes.title: From Arar to Jeddah
notes.text: Animal House rescues cats and dogs from across Saudi Arabia, with adoption stories reaching as far as Los Angeles and Paris.

notes.eyebrow: A small team with a wide network
notes.title: On-site care, volunteer power

pillars.title: Immediate action
pillars.text: Solve the problem on the ground through rescue work, not talk.

pillars.title: Data + proof
pillars.proof: Nobody can argue with data + proof.
pillars.text: Retain and train wildlife investigators to expose crimes and publish the data needed for action.

pillars.title: History + awareness
pillars.text: Amplify sermons and historic teachings that drive awareness around the fair treatment of animals.

pillars.title: Youth engagement
pillars.proof: Nobody can decide the future of animals in KSA better than them.
pillars.text: Engage the youth of Saudi Arabia because they will define the next era of animal welfare.

pillars.title: First-world progress
pillars.proof: Nobody can argue with first world progress.
pillars.text: Develop a sustainable shelter model that can scale across Saudi Arabia, starting with the capital.

policies.intake3: Some cats are sent to us from rescue partners in Makkah and Madinah.
policies.intake4: All cats and dogs must be microchipped, spayed/neutered, and fully vaccinated before joining the general population.

policies.homeTitle: Beauty is the hook. The system is the rescue.

gallery.title: Rescue Photos
gallery.subtitle: See the animals we care for and the facility that keeps them safe until they find their forever homes.
gallery.homeTitle: Lives in progress, not marketing props.
gallery.descriptiveText: General cat area: all cats live as a colony, not in cages. Dog area: all dogs live as a pack, not in cages. Quarantine and additional kitten areas are part of the care system.

impact.title: Rescue, data, education, scale.

pillars.label: Rescue + rehabilitation
pillars.copy: Every intake moves through quarantine, veterinary care, vaccination, microchipping, and sterilization before joining the general population or adoption pipeline.

pillars.label: TNR with proof
pillars.copy: 1,700+ Trap-Neuter-Return procedures have prevented an estimated 270,000 future street-cat births in Riyadh.

pillars.label: Youth awareness
pillars.copy: Educational site visits and campaigns help young Saudis build a culture of mercy, responsibility, and animal welfare.

pillars.label: International rehoming
pillars.copy: When the right family is abroad, Animal House makes the distance work — because a permanent safe home is the goal.

impact.leadText: The front page is now the story.
grid: Future facility capacity: 600 cats on site
Future facility capacity: 50 dogs on site
Future TNR target: 2,400 spay/neuter procedures per year
100+ community feeding and water stations installed
4+ government partnerships: Sports Boulevard, MOFA, Diriyah, New Murabba

metadata.title: About Animal House - Our Story & Mission
metadata.description: Learn about Animal House, a NO-KILL animal rescue in Saudi Arabia founded by Colin Rhys and Khadija Abdullah. Discover our mission, facility, and team.

hero.title: About Animal House
hero.subtitle: From a dream to a movement — discover how two people and a growing community are changing the future for animals in Saudi Arabia.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Animal House was started by Colin Rhys and Khadija Abdullah with a mission to improve the lives of cats and dogs on the streets of the Kingdom. We have taken dogs in from as far as Arar province and have found adopters for our animals as far as Los Angeles and Paris.
mission.paragraph2: We are a NO-KILL rescue so any animal who joins us knows they will live their life out in peace on this earth. Our approach combines immediate rescue action, data-driven TNR programs, youth education, and sustainable shelter development.
mission.quote: Nobody can argue with results. Nobody can argue with data + proof. Nobody can argue with history.

pillars.title: Our Vision Pillars
pillars.subtitle: Five strategic priorities guide everything we do at Animal House.
pillars.actionDesc: We solve problems on the ground through direct rescue, not just talk. Every animal we save is proof that change is possible.
pillars.dataDesc: We train wildlife investigators, document crimes, and publish data. Evidence drives policy change and public awareness.
pillars.awarenessDesc: We amplify sermons and historic teachings that promote fair treatment of animals, swaying hearts and minds through heritage.
pillars.youthDesc: We engage the youth of Saudi Arabia because they will decide the future of animal welfare in the Kingdom.
pillars.scaleDesc: We are developing a replicable shelter model to expand across Saudi Arabia, starting with the capital and building outward.

facility.title: Our Facility
facility.paragraph1: Our current facility is housed within an Istraha 45 minutes from Riyadh. It includes dedicated zones for cats, dogs, quarantine, kittens, nursing mothers, and FIV-positive cats.
facility.item1: Cat colony area — open living, not cages
facility.item2: Dog pack area — social group housing
facility.item6: FIV isolation zone with specialist care
facility.paragraph2: A local veterinarian visits weekly, and our on-site team ensures every animal receives grooming, nutrition, and enrichment daily.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: From humble beginnings to a movement transforming animal welfare in the Kingdom.
timeline.foundedDesc: Colin Rhys and Khadija Abdullah start Animal House with a vision and determination.
timeline.firstfacilityDesc: Established the initial Istraha-based shelter to house rescued animals safely.
timeline.tnrlaunchDesc: Launched Trap-Neuter-Return initiative, preventing tens of thousands of future street births.
timeline.internationalDesc: First adoptions to homes in Los Angeles and Paris, proving love knows no borders.
timeline.youthprogramDesc: Hosted first educational school visits, engaging 600+ young Saudis annually.
timeline.waqfDesc: Began planning a purpose-built rescue center as a sustainable waqf for animals.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: A small but mighty team, supported by hundreds of volunteers who make the impossible possible.
